messages.content: 尊敬的用户。我们已经为您申请补发新的设备和退还垫付的邮费。目前仍处于公司申请流程中，预计需要一定的时间，请您耐心等待。感谢您的支持和配合，祝您生活愉快。   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We would like to inform you that we have applied for a replacement device on your behalf and have also initiated the refund for the prepaid postage. Currently, the request is still in process within our company and may take some time. We kindly ask for your patience while we work on resolving this matter.

We would like to express our gratitude for your support and cooperation throughout this process. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us. 

Thank you for your understanding and we wish you a pleasant day ahead.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成不便。您的设备是否已拆封使用，如果已拆封，是不支持退货退款的。如果没有拆封，请发送相关的视频给我们。感谢您的支持与配合。祝您生活愉快         基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We apologize for any inconvenience caused. We would like to inquire whether the device has been unpacked and used. If it has already been unpacked, we regret to inform you that we do not support returns and refunds. However, if it has not been unpacked, please provide us with a video documenting the device's condition.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your support. Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，请问您是出于什么理由而选择退款呢？是对我们产品不满意吗？  基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We would like to understand the reason behind your decision to request a refund. Is it because you are unsatisfied with our product? We value your feedback and would appreciate any specific details or concerns you may have regarding our product.

Please kindly provide us with more information so that we can assist you better. Your satisfaction is our utmost priority, and we will do our best to address any issues or resolve any problems you may have.

Thank you for your cooperation and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到您的反馈。我们的退货政策是这样的，如果是非质量问题，需要您将设备寄回到我们的仓库并承担运费。我们了解到，从法国到美国的邮费不便宜。我们希望您可以留下设备，我们给您退款30%。如有任何问题您可以随时联系我们，祝您生活愉快。     基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We would like to clarify our return policy. If the issue with the device is not related to its quality, we require you to return the device to our warehouse at your own expense. We understand that shipping costs from France to the United States can be quite expensive. In light of this, we would like to offer you a partial refund of 30% of the device's value if you choose to keep it.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and assure you that we value your satisfaction. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. 

We appreciate your understanding and wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
写给好兄弟新婚大喜之日的话

亲爱的好兄弟，

在这个特别的日子里，我想向你表达最真挚的祝福和喜悦。恭喜你迎娶了你心爱的人，开始了婚姻生活的新篇章。

我想起我们曾一起经历的点滴，从相识到相知，我们一起度过了无数的快乐时光和艰难时刻。现在，你已经找到了你的另一半，这将是你们继续创造美好回忆的开始。

婚姻是一段充满挑战和成长的旅程，但也是充满甜蜜和幸福的。我希望你们两个人携手共进，在彼此的支持和爱的滋养下，共同度过每一个日子。愿你们的爱情与时光流逝一起增长，彼此的理解和宽容不断深化。

在未来的岁月里，愿你们永远拥有那份初次相遇时的激情和热情，始终保持对彼此的敬重和珍惜。愿你们共同携手走过人生的每一个阶段，共同追求幸福和成功。

最后，祝福你和你的妻子，在新的人生阶段中，幸福美满，百年好合。愿你们的婚姻之旅充满笑声、快乐和无尽的爱。真心祝福你们，祝新婚大喜！

永远是你最亲密的好兄弟，

（你的名字）
尊敬的用户，我们收到了您的反馈。对于您的问题，我们是利用雷达的微波以及PIR的温度感知来识别猫咪的。如您有任何问题，请随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. Regarding your question, we utilize radar microwave and PIR temperature sensing to detect cats. We have implemented these technologies to optimize the accuracy of our cat detection system. 

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. We are here to provide you with any assistance you may need.

Thank you again for your feedback, and we wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，由于我们在欧洲没有仓库，所以无法寄到欧洲。   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We appreciate your understanding. Unfortunately, we currently do not have a warehouse in Europe, which means we are unable to ship to European countries at this time.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. If you have any further inquiries or if there is anything else we can assist you with, please feel free to contact us.

Thank you for your understanding and support.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户。由于我们在欧洲并没有仓库，所以无法寄到欧洲。我们了解到，您购买的价格已经是我们最便宜的价格，请问您这边是什么原因让您想退货呢？对于您的问题，我希望您这边保留该设备，我们给您退还30美金。如果您不接受的话，那么就请您寄回我们的美国仓库并承担邮费。如有任何问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We regret to inform you that we do not have a warehouse in Europe, which makes it impossible for us to ship the item to European countries. We understand that you believe the price you paid for the product is already the lowest available. Therefore, we would like to inquire about the specific reason for your decision to return the item.

Considering your request, we would like to offer a partial refund of $30 if you choose to keep the device. However, if you do not accept this offer, we kindly ask you to return the item to our warehouse in the United States at your own expense.

Please feel free to contact us if you have any further questions or concerns. Thank you for your understanding, and we wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。我们想向您了解您退货退款的原因，麻烦您告诉我们。另外，也请您确保设备未使用且不影响二次销售。如有问题，请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。   基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We would like to understand the reason behind your request for a return and refund. Kindly provide us with the specific details regarding your decision.

Additionally, we kindly ask that you ensure the device has not been used and is in a condition that does not affect its resale. Should you have any further inquiries or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

Thank you for your cooperation, and we wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成麻烦。由于目前我们无法运送到哥伦比亚。所以无法给您补发底座。为了弥补您，我们给予50美金的作为补偿。感谢您的支持与配合。 祝您生活愉快。  基于以上内容 写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Unfortunately, we are unable to deliver the stand to Colombia at the moment. As a way to compensate for this, we would like to offer you a $50 refund.

Thank you for your understanding and support. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us.

We appreciate your cooperation and wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户。感谢您的反馈。目前暂时无法寄送到您所在的国家阿联酋，我们正在寻找合适的物流方案，一旦找到便可以送至阿联酋。感谢您的支持与关注，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. Currently, we regret to inform you that we are unable to ship to your country, the United Arab Emirates. However, we are actively exploring suitable logistics solutions to enable delivery to the UAE. Once we find a suitable option, we will be able to ship to your location.

We appreciate your support and understanding. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your patience, and we wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。目前，我们的应用程序无法更改为德语，我已经将您的诉求反馈给产品经理。感谢您的支持！祝您生活愉快！    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We would like to inform you that currently, our application does not support a change to the German language. However, I have forwarded your request to our product manager for further consideration.

We appreciate your support and understanding. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to us.

Thank you for your support! We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的支持。请您提供您的paypal账号，我们会退您30美金，以此了结。感谢您的支持，祝您生活愉快！   基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your support. In order to resolve the matter, we kindly request you to provide us with your PayPal account information. We will process a refund of $30 to your account. 

We appreciate your understanding and support. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Thank you for your cooperation, and we wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户。在此过程中让您造成不好的体验，我们深表抱歉。我们也会将继续优化售后流程。目前我们提供您两个售后方案，1、请您提供可收货的地址，电话，邮编以及收件人姓名，我们将给您寄送全新的设备 2、请您保留目前的设备，我们给您退还50%款项。请您告诉我们，您的选择，感谢您的支持与配合。  祝您生活愉快                  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We would like to express our sincere apologies for any inconvenience caused during this process. We value your feedback and are committed to continuously improving our after-sales procedures.

At this time, we would like to offer you two options for resolving the issue:
1. Please provide us with a valid shipping address, contact number, postal code, and recipient's name. We will promptly send you a brand new device.
2. Alternatively, you may choose to keep the current device and we will refund you 50% of the purchase amount.

We appreciate your support and cooperation. Please let us know which option you prefer by informing us of your choice. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your understanding and support. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的咨询。我们了解到，目前无法寄送到澳大利亚，但我正与相关人员想办法为您解决问题。如果有新的进展，我们将第一时间告知您。再次感谢您对我们的支持，祝您生活愉快！      基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your inquiry. We understand that we are currently unable to ship to Australia. However, please be assured that I am actively working with our team to find a solution for your issue. If there are any updates, we will inform you as soon as possible.

We sincerely appreciate your support and patience in this matter. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Thank you once again for your support. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。我们抱歉的是目前没有这样的配件可以购买或配送。如果您需要购买第二个新设备，我们给您提供优惠。感谢您使用我们的产品。祝您生活愉快！  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

Thank you for your feedback. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. Unfortunately, we do not currently have the specific accessory available for purchase or delivery. However, if you wish to purchase a second new device, we can offer you a special discount.

We appreciate your understanding and support. Thank you for choosing our product. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成不便。请您配合我们，录制一段相关的视频，我们会转发给我们的工程师便于排查问题。请您提供一段视频，否则我们很难帮助您。谢谢您的配合。祝您生活愉快。     基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear User,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. In order to assist you better, we kindly request your cooperation in providing a video related to the issue. This will help our engineers to diagnose and troubleshoot the problem effectively. Without the video, it would be challenging for us to provide the necessary assistance.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your prompt response. Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
